name: Spandine
description:
__Affiliations:__ CP9 (former)
__Occupations:__ CP9 Chief (former); 66 
__Height:__ 275 cm (9'0")
__First Appearance:__ Chapter 392; Episode 275 

Spandine is the father of Spandam and was CP9's chief 22 years ago. He led the "investigation" in Ohara and was responsible for summoning the Buster Call.
